data.title: Rutinas, hábitos y experiencias
data.checkpoint_description: En esta unidad practicas el present perfect (have/has + participio) para hablar de experiencias y de acciones recientes, con just (justo/recién), already (ya) y yet (todavía / ya, en negativas y preguntas), y con for (durante) y since (desde). Contrastas el pasado simple (momento terminado y conocido: yesterday, last week, ago) con el present perfect (experiencia o pasado sin tiempo concreto), y usas used to para hablar de hábitos y estados del pasado que ya no ocurren.

lessons.title: ¿Alguna vez lo has hecho?
lessons.topic: Present perfect para experiencias: have/has + participio, ever y never

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa: "___ you ever traveled abroad?"
Completa: "She has ___ tried Thai food."
Completa con el participio de "eat": "I have ___ sushi a few times."
items.text: I have ___ sushi a few times.
accepted: eaten

items.source: ¿Alguna vez has estado en el extranjero?
accepted: Have you ever been abroad
Have you ever been abroad?
Have you been abroad before?
Have you ever travelled abroad?
Have you ever traveled abroad?

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "Nunca he viajado en avión".

options: Have you ever met someone famous?
items.value: Have you ever met someone famous?

items.text: I have never been to Asia, but I would love to go.

lessons.title: Just, already y yet
lessons.topic: Acciones recientes y resultados: present perfect con just, already y yet

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa: "I'm not hungry. I've ___ had lunch."
Completa: "Have you finished your homework ___?"
Completa con "already": "We have ___ seen this film twice."
items.text: We have ___ seen this film twice.
accepted: already

items.source: Acabo de terminar el informe.
items.value: I have just finished the report.
accepted: I've just finished the report
I have just finished the report
I just finished the report
I've just finished the report.

items.prompt: Ordena: "Todavía no han llegado".

options: The bus has already left the station.
The bus left the station an hour ago.
The bus will leave the station soon.
items.value: The bus has already left the station.

items.text: I haven't decided yet, but I've just made some coffee.

lessons.title: Desde hace cuánto: for y since
lessons.topic: Duración con present perfect: for (durante) y since (desde)

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa: "I have lived here ___ 2019."
Completa: "We have known each other ___ ten years."
Completa con "since": "She has worked here ___ last March."
items.text: She has worked here ___ last March.
accepted: since

items.source: He estudiado inglés durante tres años.
items.value: I have studied English for three years.
accepted: I've studied English for three years
I have studied English for 3 years
I have been studying English for three years
I've been studying English for three years

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "No los he visto desde el lunes".

options: We have lived in this city for five years.
We lived in this city five years ago.
We are going to live in this city for five years.
items.value: We have lived in this city for five years.

items.text: I haven't slept well lately, and I've been very tired since Monday.

lessons.title: Antes y ahora: used to y pasado simple
lessons.topic: Hábitos del pasado con used to y contraste pasado simple vs present perfect

items.prompt: Empareja cada expresión con su traducción.
Completa: "When I was a child, I ___ play in the park every day."
Elige la frase correcta para un momento terminado: "___".
options: I have visited Rome last year.

items.prompt: Completa con la forma negativa de used to: "I ___ like coffee, but now I love it."
items.text: I ___ like coffee, but now I love it.
accepted: didn't use to
did not use to
never used to
used not to

items.source: Antes fumaba, pero lo dejé hace dos años.
items.value: I used to smoke, but I quit two years ago.
accepted: I used to smoke, but I quit two years ago
I used to smoke but I gave it up two years ago
I used to smoke, but I stopped two years ago
I used to smoke, but I gave up two years ago

items.prompt: Ordena: "Antes vivíamos en el campo".
items.value: We used to live in the countryside

options: She used to walk to school when she was young.
She has walked to school today.
She is walking to school right now.
items.value: She used to walk to school when she was young.

items.text: I used to play the guitar twice a week, but I haven't practiced since last summer.

data.title: Trabajo, estudios y planes
data.checkpoint_description: En esta unidad practicas el primer condicional (if + presente simple, will + verbo) para hablar de consecuencias reales en el trabajo y los estudios; introduces el present perfect continuous (have/has been + verbo-ing) para acciones que empezaron en el pasado y siguen ahora; y distingues 'be going to' (planes y decisiones ya tomadas) de 'will' (decisiones del momento, predicciones y ofrecimientos). Todo con léxico de trabajo, estudios y planes de futuro.

lessons.title: Buscar y solicitar trabajo
lessons.topic: Vocabulario de búsqueda de empleo y primer condicional

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa: "If I send my résumé today, they ___ call me next week."
Completa: "She wants to ___ for a job at the bank."
Completa con el verbo en presente (primer condicional): "If you ___ early, you will get the job."
items.text: If you ___ early, you will get the job.
accepted: apply

items.source: Si preparo mi currículum, conseguiré una entrevista.
items.value: If I prepare my résumé, I will get an interview.
accepted: If I prepare my résumé, I'll get an interview
If I prepare my resume, I will get an interview
If I prepare my resume, I'll get an interview
If I prepare my résumé, I will get a job interview
If I prepare my resume, I will get a job interview

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "Si me postulo hoy, ahorraré tiempo".

options: If I apply for this job, I will need a good résumé.
I applied for three jobs last month.
She is going to start her new job tomorrow.
items.value: If I apply for this job, I will need a good résumé.

items.text: If I get this interview, I will be really happy.

lessons.title: El primer día y las tareas
lessons.topic: Rutinas y responsabilidades laborales con primer condicional

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa: "If we miss the ___, the manager will be angry."
Completa: "If you finish the report, I ___ help you with the emails."
Completa con el verbo correcto: "You must ___ in the project before Friday."
items.text: You must ___ in the project before Friday.
accepted: hand

items.source: Si terminamos a tiempo, el jefe estará contento.
items.value: If we finish on time, the manager will be happy.
accepted: If we finish on time, the boss will be happy
If we finish in time, the manager will be happy
If we finish on time, the manager will be glad

items.prompt: Ordena: "Si ayudas a tu compañero, terminarás más rápido".
items.value: If you help your colleague, you will finish faster

options: If I miss the deadline, my manager will not be happy.
My colleague works in a different office.
We will hand in the report next Monday.
items.value: If I miss the deadline, my manager will not be happy.

items.text: If you need help, just ask one of your colleagues.

lessons.title: Estudios y formación
lessons.topic: Educación y present perfect continuous (introducción)

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa: "I have ___ studying English for three years."
Completa: "She has been ___ a new skill since January."
Completa con la forma -ing del verbo 'study': "They have been ___ for the exam all week."
items.text: They have been ___ for the exam all week.
accepted: studying

items.source: He estado tomando un curso de formación.
items.value: I have been taking a training course.
accepted: I've been taking a training course
I have been doing a training course
I've been doing a training course

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "He estado estudiando para mi título".

options: I have been studying for my degree for two years.
I studied at university many years ago.
I am going to start a new course next month.
items.value: I have been studying for my degree for two years.

items.text: I have been learning new skills at my training course.

lessons.title: Planes de futuro y decisiones
lessons.topic: be going to vs will para planes y carrera

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Elige el plan ya decidido: "Next year I ___ study abroad. I already have my ticket."
Decisión del momento: "The phone is ringing. I ___ answer it."
Completa con 'going to' (plan ya decidido): "She is ___ apply for a promotion next month."
items.text: She is ___ apply for a promotion next month.
accepted: going to

items.source: Voy a buscar un trabajo mejor el año que viene.
items.value: I am going to look for a better job next year.
accepted: I'm going to look for a better job next year
I am going to find a better job next year
I'm going to find a better job next year

items.prompt: Ordena: "Voy a estudiar en el extranjero el próximo año".
items.value: I am going to study abroad next year

options: I am going to ask my manager for a promotion.
I asked my manager for a day off yesterday.
If I work hard, I will get a better salary.
items.value: I am going to ask my manager for a promotion.

items.text: Next year I am going to study abroad and improve my career.

data.title: Opiniones y acuerdos
data.checkpoint_description: En esta unidad practicas dar opiniones (I think/believe that…, In my opinion…), expresar acuerdo y desacuerdo con So do I / Neither do I (y So am I / Neither am I), introducir lo que otra persona dijo con estilo indirecto (He said that…, She told me that…) y unir ideas con conectores (because, although, however, so). Umbral 80%.

lessons.title: Dar tu opinión
lessons.topic: Expresar opiniones con think, believe y in my opinion
lessons.description: Aprende a introducir tu opinión de forma natural.

items.prompt: Empareja cada expresión con su traducción.
Completa: "I ___ that this film is boring."
Elige la forma natural para dar una opinión.
options: In my opinion, the plan is good.
On my opinion, the plan is good.
At my opinion, the plan is good.
items.value: In my opinion, the plan is good.

items.prompt: Completa con el verbo de opinión: "I ___ that she is right."
items.text: I ___ that she is right.
accepted: believe
think

items.source: Creo que tienes razón.
accepted: I think you're right
I think that you are right
I think that you're right
I believe you are right
I believe you're right

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "En mi opinión, este libro es excelente".

options: In my opinion, this is a great idea.
In my opinion, this is a bad idea.
I don't have an opinion about it.
items.value: In my opinion, this is a great idea.

items.text: I think that this is a really interesting topic.

lessons.title: Estoy de acuerdo, yo también
lessons.topic: Acuerdo con So do I y So am I
lessons.description: Expresa que tú también, de forma corta y natural.

items.prompt: Empareja cada respuesta con su significado.
"I love coffee." Responde que tú también.
"I am tired." Responde que tú también.
Completa para mostrar acuerdo: "I like this song." "So ___ I."
items.text: "I like this song." "So ___ I."
accepted: do

items.source: Estoy completamente de acuerdo contigo.
accepted: I totally agree with you
I completely agree with you.
I agree with you completely
I fully agree with you

items.prompt: Ordena la respuesta de acuerdo: "So do I".

options: So do I, it's my favourite.
So am I, I'm really happy.
Neither do I, I hate it.
items.value: So do I, it's my favourite.

items.text: I agree with you. The food here is really good.

lessons.title: Tampoco estoy de acuerdo
lessons.topic: Desacuerdo y Neither do I, Neither am I
lessons.description: Aprende a decir que tú tampoco y a mostrar desacuerdo.

items.prompt: Empareja cada expresión con su traducción.
"I don't like horror films." Responde que tú tampoco.
"I'm not hungry." Responde que tú tampoco.
Completa para mostrar desacuerdo: "I'm sorry, but I ___ with you."
items.text: I'm sorry, but I ___ with you.
accepted: disagree
don't agree
do not agree

items.source: No estoy de acuerdo con esa idea.
accepted: I don't agree with that idea
I do not agree with that idea
I disagree with that idea.

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "No creo eso tampoco".

options: Neither do I, I think he's wrong.
So do I, I think he's right.
items.value: Neither do I, I think he's wrong.

items.text: I'm afraid I disagree. I don't think that is a good idea.

lessons.title: Contar lo que otros dijeron
lessons.topic: Estilo indirecto con He said that y conectores
lessons.description: Reporta opiniones de otras personas y conecta tus ideas.

items.prompt: Empareja cada conector con su traducción.
Completa el estilo indirecto: "He ___ that he agreed with me."
Completa con el conector correcto: "I like the plan, ___ it is expensive."
Completa el estilo indirecto: "She ___ me that the meeting was cancelled."
items.text: She ___ me that the meeting was cancelled.
accepted: told

items.source: Él dijo que estaba de acuerdo con el plan.
items.value: He said that he agreed with the plan.
accepted: He said he agreed with the plan
He said that he agreed with the plan.
He said he agreed with the plan.

items.prompt: Ordena: "She said that she disagreed".

options: He said that he agreed with our idea.
She told me that she was very tired.
They said that the shop was closed.
items.value: He said that he agreed with our idea.

items.text: She told me that she liked the idea, although she had a few questions.

data.title: Historias y viajes
data.checkpoint_description: En esta unidad narras en pasado y hablas de viajes. Usas el pasado simple para acciones terminadas y el pasado continuo (was/were + -ing) para acciones en progreso, combinándolos con 'while' (acción larga) y 'when' (acción que interrumpe). También describes personas, cosas y lugares con cláusulas relativas: 'who' para personas, 'which' para cosas y 'that' para ambos.

lessons.title: El comienzo del viaje
lessons.topic: Narrar en pasado simple: preparar y empezar un viaje

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra de viaje con su traducción.
Completa la narración: "Last summer we ___ to Portugal for two weeks."
Elige la opción que cuenta una acción terminada en el pasado.
options: We packed our luggage the night before.
We are packing our luggage now.
We will pack our luggage tomorrow.
items.value: We packed our luggage the night before.

items.prompt: Completa con el pasado simple del verbo entre paréntesis: "Our flight ___ (leave) early in the morning."
items.text: Our flight ___ early in the morning.
accepted: left

items.source: El año pasado viajamos al extranjero por primera vez.
items.value: Last year we travelled abroad for the first time.
accepted: Last year we traveled abroad for the first time.
Last year, we travelled abroad for the first time.
Last year, we traveled abroad for the first time.
We travelled abroad for the first time last year.
We traveled abroad for the first time last year.

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "Llegamos al aeropuerto a tiempo".

options: Our flight to Rome was delayed by two hours.
Our flight to Rome arrived early in the morning.
The train to Rome was completely full.
items.value: Our flight to Rome was delayed by two hours.

items.text: Last summer we packed our luggage and started an amazing journey.

lessons.title: Lo que pasaba mientras...
lessons.topic: Pasado continuo vs pasado simple con while/when

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa: "We ___ along the beach when it started to rain."
Completa: "While I ___ a map, a local woman offered to help us."
Completa con el pasado simple (la acción que interrumpe): "While we were exploring the old town, it suddenly ___ (start) to rain."
items.text: While we were exploring the old town, it suddenly ___ to rain.
accepted: started

items.source: Estábamos esperando el tren cuando vimos a un viejo amigo.
items.value: We were waiting for the train when we saw an old friend.
accepted: We were waiting for a train when we saw an old friend.
When we saw an old friend, we were waiting for the train.
When we saw an old friend, we were waiting for a train.

items.prompt: Ordena para formar la oración: "Estaba lloviendo cuando llegamos al hotel".
items.value: It was raining when we arrived at the hotel

options: While we were having lunch, the bus left without us.
After we had lunch, we took the next bus together.
We were having lunch when the rain finally stopped.
items.value: While we were having lunch, the bus left without us.

items.text: While we were crossing the bridge, the sun suddenly came out.

lessons.title: La gente y los lugares del viaje
lessons.topic: Cláusulas relativas con who/which/that para describir

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Elige el pronombre relativo correcto: "The guide ___ showed us the city was very friendly."
Elige el pronombre relativo correcto: "We visited a village ___ had beautiful old houses."
Completa con el relativo para personas: "She is the woman ___ helped us when we got lost."
items.text: She is the woman ___ helped us when we got lost.
accepted: who
that

items.source: Es un paisaje que nunca olvidaré.
items.value: It is a landscape that I will never forget.
accepted: It is a landscape which I will never forget.
It's a landscape that I will never forget.
It's a landscape which I will never forget.
It is a landscape that I'll never forget.
It's a landscape that I'll never forget.
It is a landscape which I'll never forget.
It's a landscape which I'll never forget.

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "Compré un recuerdo que estaba hecho a mano".

options: The man who sold us the tickets spoke perfect English.
The woman who sold us the tickets spoke perfect English.
The man who sold us the souvenirs spoke a little English.
items.value: The man who sold us the tickets spoke perfect English.

items.text: We stayed in a small hotel that had an amazing view of the mountains.

lessons.title: Una anécdota inolvidable
lessons.topic: Integrar tiempos y relativos para contar una historia de viaje

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa: "We ___ that we had missed the last train."
Completa la anécdota: "It was the most ___ trip of my life."
Completa con el pasado continuo el verbo entre paréntesis: "When the storm started, we were still ___ (explore) the forest."
items.text: When the storm started, we were still ___ the forest.
accepted: exploring

items.source: Perdimos el tren, pero conocimos a una pareja que nos llevó a la ciudad.
items.value: We missed the train, but we met a couple who drove us to the city.
accepted: We missed the train but we met a couple who drove us to the city.
We missed the train, but we met a couple that drove us to the city.
We missed the train but we met a couple that drove us to the city.

items.prompt: Ordena para formar la oración: "Fue una aventura que nunca olvidaremos".
items.value: It was an adventure that we will never forget

options: We were driving through the mountains when the car broke down.
We were walking through the city when we lost our map.
We were flying over the mountains when the storm began.
items.value: We were driving through the mountains when the car broke down.

items.text: It was an unforgettable adventure that I will tell my friends about for years.

data.title: Problemas y soluciones
data.checkpoint_description: En esta unidad practicas cómo describir problemas cotidianos y proponer soluciones. Usas el condicional cero (If + presente, presente) para verdades y normas, y el condicional primero (If + presente, will + verbo) para consecuencias probables. Además dominas los modales: must y have to (obligación), mustn't y can't (prohibición), y should/shouldn't (consejo), para dar instrucciones, advertencias y recomendaciones al resolver averías, retrasos, errores y emergencias.

lessons.title: Cuando algo se rompe
lessons.topic: Condicional cero: normas y reacciones automáticas ante problemas en casa y con aparatos

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa la norma general: "If the heater ___ too hot, it switches off automatically."
Elige la frase correcta para una verdad general (condicional cero).
options: If you press this button, the screen turns off.
If you will press this button, the screen turns off.
If you press this button, the screen will turning off.
If you pressing this button, the screen turns off.
items.value: If you press this button, the screen turns off.

items.prompt: Completa con el verbo en presente (condicional cero): "If the pipe is old, it usually ___ water."
items.text: If the pipe is old, it usually ___ water.
accepted: leaks

items.source: Si el ordenador se calienta, se apaga.
items.value: If the computer gets hot, it turns off.
accepted: If the computer gets hot, it turns off
If the computer gets hot it turns off.
If the computer gets hot, it switches off.
When the computer gets hot, it turns off.
If the computer becomes hot, it turns off.

items.prompt: Ordena la frase: "Si lo dejas caer, se rompe."
items.value: If you drop it, it breaks

options: If the light is red, the machine is broken.
If the light is green, the machine is ready.
When the light is blue, the machine is off.
items.value: If the light is red, the machine is broken.

items.text: If the washing machine breaks down again, we call the technician.

lessons.title: Si pasa esto, haré aquello
lessons.topic: Condicional primero: consecuencias probables y planes ante retrasos y fechas límite

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa con condicional primero: "If we miss the deadline, the client ___ angry."
Elige la frase correcta (primer condicional para una consecuencia futura probable).
options: If the bus is late, I will take a taxi.
If the bus will be late, I take a taxi.
If the bus is late, I take will a taxi.
If the bus late, I will take a taxi.
items.value: If the bus is late, I will take a taxi.

items.prompt: Completa con "will" + verbo: "If you don't hurry, you ___ the train."
items.text: If you don't hurry, you ___ the train.
accepted: will miss
'll miss
you will miss

items.source: Si hay un retraso, te llamaré.
items.value: If there is a delay, I will call you.
accepted: If there is a delay, I will call you
If there is a delay, I'll call you.
If there's a delay, I will call you.
If there's a delay, I'll call you.
I will call you if there is a delay.

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "Si terminamos pronto, te ayudaré."

options: If the meeting starts late, we will change the plan.
If the meeting starts early, we will cancel it.
When the meeting ends, we will go home.
items.value: If the meeting starts late, we will change the plan.

items.text: If the project is delayed, we will tell the manager immediately.

lessons.title: Reglas, avisos y obligaciones
lessons.topic: Modales must / have to / mustn't / can't: obligación y prohibición en el trabajo y los servicios

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa con obligación: "You ___ wear a helmet on the building site."
Elige la prohibición correcta para un cartel de seguridad.
options: You mustn't use the lift during a fire.
You must use the lift during a fire.
You don't must use the lift during a fire.
You haven't to use the lift during a fire.
items.value: You mustn't use the lift during a fire.

items.prompt: Completa con obligación externa (norma de la empresa): "Everyone ___ to sign in at reception."
items.text: Everyone ___ to sign in at reception.
accepted: has

items.source: No puedes aparcar aquí.
accepted: You can't park here
You cannot park here.
You cannot park here
You can not park here.

items.prompt: Ordena la frase: "Tienes que reportar cada error."
items.value: You have to report every mistake

options: You must turn off your phone in the meeting.
You must turn on your phone in the meeting.
You can use your phone in the meeting.
items.value: You must turn off your phone in the meeting.

items.text: In an emergency, you must stay calm and call for help.

lessons.title: Pedir ayuda y dar consejo
lessons.topic: Modales should / shouldn't y frases para quejarse, pedir reembolso y resolver el problema

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa con consejo: "The phone is still broken. You ___ ask for a refund."
Elige el consejo correcto para alguien que cometió un error.
options: You shouldn't ignore the problem; you should fix it.
You shouldn't to ignore the problem; you should fix it.
You don't should ignore the problem; you should fix it.
You shouldn't ignoring the problem; you should fix it.
items.value: You shouldn't ignore the problem; you should fix it.

items.prompt: Completa con consejo negativo: "The charger is faulty. You ___ use it." (no es buena idea)
items.text: The charger is faulty. You ___ use it.
accepted: shouldn't
should not

items.source: Deberías quejarte al gerente.
items.value: You should complain to the manager.
accepted: You should complain to the manager
You should complain to the manager.
You ought to complain to the manager.

items.prompt: Arma la pregunta para pedir un consejo: "¿Qué debería hacer?"

options: You should keep the receipt if you want a refund.
You should throw away the receipt after you pay.
You shouldn't ask for a refund today.
items.value: You should keep the receipt if you want a refund.

items.text: If you have a problem with the product, you should call customer service first.

data.title: Cultura, medios y futuro
data.checkpoint_description: En esta unidad practicas la voz pasiva en presente y pasado (is made / was built) para hablar de cómo se crean y producen las cosas, el segundo condicional (If I had…, I would…) para imaginar situaciones y sueños hipotéticos, y los comparativos avanzados con as…as y not as…as para comparar películas, medios y experiencias. Todo en el contexto de cultura, medios de comunicación y planes de futuro.

lessons.title: How things are made
lessons.topic: Voz pasiva en presente: hablar de cómo se crean y producen las cosas (is made / are produced).

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa con voz pasiva en presente: "This bread ___ made every morning."
Elige la frase pasiva correcta para "Estos coches se fabrican en Japón".
options: These cars are made in Japan.
These cars is made in Japan.
items.value: These cars are made in Japan.

items.prompt: Completa con la forma pasiva: "Coffee ___ grown in Colombia."
items.text: Coffee ___ grown in Colombia.
accepted: is

items.source: El queso está hecho de leche.
accepted: Cheese is made of milk
The cheese is made of milk.
The cheese is made of milk
Cheese is made from milk.
Cheese is made from milk

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "Estas botellas están hechas de plástico".

options: Millions of newspapers are printed every day.
Millions of people read books at home.
Many newspapers were sold last week.
items.value: Millions of newspapers are printed every day.

items.text: Chocolate is made from cocoa, and it is sold all around the world.

lessons.title: Famous places and the past
lessons.topic: Voz pasiva en pasado: hablar de monumentos, edificios y obras culturales (was built / were created).

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa con voz pasiva en pasado: "The bridge ___ built in 1890."
Elige la frase pasiva correcta para "Esas casas fueron construidas hace cien años".
options: Those houses were built a hundred years ago.
Those houses was built a hundred years ago.
Those houses are built a hundred years ago.
items.value: Those houses were built a hundred years ago.

items.prompt: Completa con la forma pasiva en pasado: "The castle ___ built by the king."
items.text: The castle ___ built by the king.
accepted: was

items.source: El museo fue construido en 1950.
accepted: The museum was built in 1950
The museum was built in nineteen fifty.
The museum was built in nineteen fifty

items.prompt: Ordena: "Esta iglesia fue construida hace muchos años".
items.value: This church was built many years ago

options: This famous tower was built more than a century ago.
This famous tower is the tallest in the city.
These famous towers are visited every year.
items.value: This famous tower was built more than a century ago.

items.text: The old theatre was built in 1925, and it is still famous today.

lessons.title: Comparing films and media
lessons.topic: Comparativos avanzados con as…as y not as…as para comparar películas, programas y medios.

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa: "The book is ___ interesting as the film."
Elige la frase correcta para "El programa no es tan emocionante como la película".
options: The show is not as exciting as the film.
The show is not so exciting than the film.
The show is not exciting as the film.
items.value: The show is not as exciting as the film.

items.prompt: Completa con la estructura "not as … as": "This channel is not ___ popular as the news."
items.text: This channel is not ___ popular as the news.
accepted: as

items.source: Este documental es tan interesante como la película.
items.value: This documentary is as interesting as the film.
accepted: This documentary is as interesting as the film
This documentary is as interesting as the movie.
This documentary is as interesting as the movie

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "La radio no es tan popular como la televisión".

options: This series is not as exciting as the first one.
This series is the most exciting on TV.
These films are as long as the books.
items.value: This series is not as exciting as the first one.

items.text: I think the news is as important as the films we watch.

lessons.title: Dreams and the future
lessons.topic: Segundo condicional para imaginar sueños y situaciones hipotéticas (If I had…, I would…).

items.prompt: Empareja cada palabra con su traducción.
Completa el segundo condicional: "If I had more time, I ___ travel abroad."
Completa: "If I ___ rich, I would help my family."
Completa el segundo condicional: "If I had a camera, I ___ make a documentary."
items.text: If I had a camera, I ___ make a documentary.
accepted: would
'd

items.source: Si tuviera más dinero, viajaría por el mundo.
items.value: If I had more money, I would travel the world.
accepted: If I had more money, I would travel the world
If I had more money, I would travel around the world.
If I had more money, I would travel around the world
If I had more money, I'd travel the world.
If I had more money, I'd travel the world

items.prompt: Ordena: "Si viviera en el extranjero, aprendería otro idioma".
items.value: If I lived abroad I would learn another language

options: If I had the chance, I would work in the media.
If I have the chance, I will work today.
I had a great chance to study abroad.
items.value: If I had the chance, I would work in the media.

items.text: If I had more free time, I would learn to make films and travel abroad.
